actions: Read external/README.md — XCE public tool surface inventory
Read code-graph-context.ts — ContextResult schema + buildContext logic
Read handlers/context.ts — MCP handler payload shape + readiness contract
Read indexer-types.ts — SymbolKind, EdgeType, CodeNode, CodeEdge schemas
Read code-graph-db.ts — SQLite schema: code_files, code_nodes, code_edges tables
Read code-graph-tools.ts — tool name registry confirmation

label: XCE architecture_context returns HLD+LLD+component description; our code_graph_context returns raw symbols+edges only

evidence.quote: Get the full architectural context for any file or symbol — component description, low-level design, high-level design, and relationships.
ContextResult has graphContext[] with nodes+edges, textBrief, combinedSummary — no narrative HLD/LLD layer.

label: Existing graph schema stores enough data for deterministic template-only HLD/LLD (no LLM required)

evidence.quote: code_nodes stores kind, signature, docstring, fq_name, language; code_edges stores edge_type, weight, metadata.
SymbolKind has 10 values; EdgeType has 10 values; DEFAULT_EDGE_WEIGHTS defined; DetectorProvenance + EdgeEvidenceClass defined.

label: Proposed HLD/LLD schema: file_role (kind-count classifier), layer (import/export ratio), component-level summary (template), per-symbol LLD with docstring+fan-in/out — all deterministic from SQLite

evidence.quote: expandAnchor already queries edges per mode; same queryEdgesFrom/queryEdgesTo APIs can feed HLD/LLD templates.
All 10 SymbolKinds + 10 EdgeTypes available for kind-count classification and layer derivation.

label: Our payload has capabilities XCE lacks: budget truncation, edge evidence classification, detector provenance, deadline-driven expansion, multi-seed batching, readiness contract

evidence.quote: partialOutput with isPartial, reasons, omittedSections, omittedAnchors, truncatedText — budget/deadline awareness.
Per-edge confidence, detectorProvenance, evidenceClass, reason, step metadata.
